creator: maxim.konovalov@gmail.com
text:
Hi Fabian,

>  Hello
>
>  Could anybody please update this PR and push Severity and
>  Priority a little bit up. The old IP address of
>  d.root-servers.net will be gone at end of June 2013, according to
>  the "Advisory  D-root is changing its IPv4 address on the 3rd of
>  January." [1].
>
>  https://lists.dns-oarc.net/pipermail/dns-operations/2012-December/009428.html
>
This change was committed to head and stable/8,9 in January, 2013.
Could you clarify what are you asking for?

-- 
Maxim Konovalov
